role: A React form engine that converts a tool's JSON Schema parameters into a human-labeled, op-conditional configuration form.
capabilities: Renders a form from any ToolDescriptor JSON Schema
Op-conditional discriminator selector that shows only params for the chosen op
Authored label/help lookup with schema title/description fallback
Enum rendering as pill group (≤4 options) or dropdown (>4 options) with human labels
Text input fallback for remaining string-like params
Required indicator using schema.required and op-conditional opRequired
substance_why: It implements label resolution, op-conditional visibility, requiredness, and renders multiple concrete control types with accessibility attributes.
interactions_present: Clicking op discriminator pills to switch operation
Clicking enum option pills to select a value
Selecting an enum value from a dropdown
interactions_missing: No validation feedback or submit-time required-field enforcement
No support for nested object or array schema properties
No support for additionalProperties, oneOf, anyOf, or allOf schema constructs
No error/invalid state handling for controls
No reset, clear, or default-restore interactions
No keyboard or focus management beyond native controls
performance_risks: renderField is redefined inline on every render, creating fresh closures and elements
No useMemo/useCallback for visibleParams, label lookups, or control callbacks
Full form re-renders on every single field change because there is no field-level memoization
reuse_why: The op-conditional visibility rules, authored-label fallback, and per-type control selection are domain logic worth keeping, but the inline rendering and limited schema support need restructuring.
decomposition_hints: Extract label/help resolution into a pure utility
Extract op-conditional visibility logic into a pure utility
Split individual controls into separate components (EnumField, BooleanField, NumberField, TextField, TextAreaField)
Extract the op selector into its own component
Keep SchemaForm as an orchestrator that maps schema properties to control components
